style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Blastois's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into metallic dust particles. The aura is a cool, intense cerulean halo with geometric precision, casting long, sharp shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
